title: Capability Matrix Graphic — Data Schema
description: Input data for reference/graphic-templates/capability-matrix/template.html. Produces a two-column capability table: left column lists capabilities (what we do), right column lists corresponding proof points or evidence (how we prove it). Optionally supports a 3-column layout (Capability / Requirement / Evidence). Dark canvas with accent header row; rows alternate subtle panel backgrounds for readability.

title.description: Title bar (e.g., '[Your Company] Capability -> Proof Point Map'). All caps applied by CSS.

columns.description: Column headers. 2 columns = Capability / Evidence. 3 columns = Capability / Requirement / Evidence. Order matters.

accent.description: If true, this column gets the accent color treatment. Typically only the first (Capability) column.

rows.description: Matrix rows — one row per capability. Each row's `cells` array length must equal `columns` array length.

cells.description: Cell text in column order. 2 items for 2-column layout, 3 for 3-column.

highlight.description: If true, this row is highlighted (accent tint) — use sparingly, typically for the strongest proof point.

theme.description: Optional color overrides. Framework defaults are a neutral dark canvas with red accent — override these to match your brand by passing your own values, or copy the template to my-company/graphic-templates/ for a permanent override.
